subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! Thy letter hath attained unto the presence of this Wronged One in the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحیم نامه ات در سجن اعظم بحضور فائز اینمظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
